temporal_description: (00:00-00:07) In a dark, stone-walled hall, a chaotic scene unfolds as students in black school uniforms scramble down a wide staircase. A young man in a white shirt is pushed down the stairs, and another student in a black shirt is knocked over. The camera pans across the pandemonium, showing students falling, tripping, and scattering across the floor in a panic. (Storyline: This opening scene establishes a moment of intense chaos and danger, immediately immersing the viewer in a perilous situation without any initial context.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: A cacophony of screams, shouts, and the thudding sounds of bodies falling and colliding. A tense, orchestral score swells in the background.)
